data.title: US Banks’ Unrealized Losses Explode by $118,400,000,000 in Three Months As FDIC Declares 66 Banks on ‘Problem List’
data.description:

data.title: Bitlayer announces strategic partnership with Base, Starknet, Arbitrum, Sonic and Plume Network to promote BitVM Bridge integration and BTCFi development
data.description:
Bitlayer, the Bitcoin second-layer ecological team, announced a strategic partnership with five public chains and protocols including Base, Starknet, Arbitrum, Sonic and Plume Network to promote the integrated deployment of BitVM Bridge and the integration of ecological protocols, provide users with a secure and highly scalable multi-chain experience of BTC assets, and unlock trillions of dollars of liquidity from the Bitcoin ecosystem for Base, Starknet, Arbitrum, Sonic and Plume Network ecosystems.
BitVM Bridge is a trust-minimized BTC bridge developed by Bitlayer, with high security, support for native returns and programmability. Currently, Bitlayer BitVM Bridge has been launched on the test network, supporting users to log in to test and experience functions such as Mint, Unmint and Reclaim. In the future, Bitlayer BitVM Bridge will open cooperation with more public chains and DeFi protocols to jointly unleash the potential of Bitcoin as a dynamic financial tool.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 600 USDT with a 3.23% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 01, 2025, 14:12 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 600.570007 USDT, with a narrowed 3.23% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: CZ mentioned the new token issuance mechanism: 10% will be unlocked initially, and further unlocking will only be possible after certain price conditions are met
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ published an article on X mentioning a new token issuance concept, the full text is as follows:
What would happen if someone issued a token according to the following token economics?
Initially, 10% of the tokens are unlocked and sold on the market. The proceeds will be used for the project team to develop products/platforms, marketing, wages and other expenses.
Each future unlocking must meet all of the following conditions: six months from the last unlocking; the token price continues to be higher than 2 times the previous unlocking price within 30 days before unlocking; each unlocking does not exceed 5%.
For example, if the token initial issuance (TGE) is in January and the price is $1, by June, if the token price is still below $2, no more tokens can be unlocked. Assuming that the token price has been above $2 from July 4 to August 3, another 5% of the tokens can be unlocked and put into circulation on August 3. Assuming the price on August 3rd is $3, the earliest possible unlocking time for the next time is March 3rd of the following year, and it can only be unlocked if the price is above $6 for more than 30 consecutive days.
The project team has the right to postpone or reduce the size of each unlock at their own discretion. If they don't want to sell more tokens, they can choose not to sell. But they can only unlock (sell) a maximum of 5% of the tokens at a time, and then they must wait at least another 6 months, and the price needs to double again. The project team does not have the right to shorten the unlocking interval or increase the size of the next unlock. The tokens will be locked by smart contracts, and the keys are controlled by a third party. This mechanism avoids a large influx of new tokens into the market when prices are low. At the same time, it also incentivizes the project team to focus on long-term development.
CZ finally said: "There are no plans to issue new tokens. This is just an idea for discussion."

data.title: Crypto bettors wager on Zelenskyy’s fate amid Trump row
data.description:
Crypto bettors are now putting wagers on the fate of Ukrainian President Volodymr Zelenskyy after a small row with United States President Donald Trump. According to reports from the polygon-based betting platform Polymarket, […]
